description: CompositionBlack sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a ribbed round neck, long raglan sleeves with patented adidas 3-Stripes, ribbed cuffs and hem, and embroidered branding on the left chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporty fashion needs, this sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable in the winter chill.
